PASSWORD_REQUIRED_FOR_ADMIN: Password is required for admin role
FILE_TOO_LARGE: File size exceeds maximum allowed size
USER_NOT_FOUND_OR_DELETED: User not found or has been deleted
USER_IN_DIFFERENT_DOMAIN: Cannot access user in different domain
CANNOT_ACCESS_PERMISSIONS_DIFFERENT_DOMA: Cannot access permissions for user in different domain
CANNOT_ASSIGN_PERMISSIONS_DIFFERENT_DOMA: Cannot assign permissions to user in different domain
CANNOT_REVOKE_PERMISSIONS_DIFFERENT_DOMA: Cannot revoke permissions from user in different domain
FONIVA_CONFIG_MISSING: FONIVA configuration is missing. Required: FONIVA_API_URL, FONIVA_USERNAME, FONIVA_PASSWORD, FONIVA_API_KEY
FONIVA_NETWORK_ERROR: FONIVA API is unreachable. Please check your network connection.
FONIVA_AUTH_FAILED: Invalid FONIVA credentials. Please check FONIVA_USERNAME, FONIVA_PASSWORD, and FONIVA_API_KEY.
FONIVA_INVALID_RESPONSE: FONIVA API response is invalid: missing messageId
WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE_INVALID: Invalid webhook signature. X-API-Key header does not match FONIVA_API_KEY.
WEBHOOK_API_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: FONIVA_API_KEY is not configured. Webhook signature verification failed.
SENDGRID_CONFIG_MISSING: SendGrid configuration is missing. Required: SENDGRID_API_KEY, MAIL_FROM
SENDGRID_NETWORK_ERROR: SendGrid API is unreachable. Please check your network connection.
SENDGRID_AUTH_FAILED: Invalid SendGrid API key. Please check SENDGRID_API_KEY.
SENDGRID_BAD_REQUEST: Invalid email request. Please check recipient email address and email content.
S3_UPLOAD_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: S3 upload failed: Invalid AWS credentials. Please check your AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.
S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_NOT_FOUND: S3 upload failed: Bucket not found or inaccessible: {bucket}
S3_UPLOAD_ACCESS_DENIED: S3 upload failed: Access denied. Please check your IAM permissions.
S3_UPLOAD_FAILED_RETRY_EXHAUSTED: S3 upload failed after {maxAttempts} attempts. Please try again later.
S3_PRESIGNED_URL_FAILED: Failed to generate download URL for file: {key}
S3_DELETE_FILE_NOT_FOUND: Failed to delete file: {key}. File not found.
ROLE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: Role is already assigned to the user
ROLE_TYPE_MISMATCH: Role type mismatch with user type
SURVEY_NOT_DRAFT: Survey is not in draft state
SURVEY_ALREADY_ANSWERED: You have already responded to this survey
SURVEY_INVALID_TICKETS: One or more tickets are invalid
